# GitHub Discussions Configuration
# To enable: Repository Settings > Features > Discussions

# Suggested Discussion Categories:

## 💬 General
For general questions and conversations about HyperTensor

## 💡 Ideas  
Feature requests and suggestions for improvement

## 🙏 Q&A
Get help from the community with usage questions

## 🎓 Show and Tell
Share what you've built with HyperTensor!

## 📢 Announcements
News and updates from maintainers

---

# To enable GitHub Discussions:
# 1. Go to your repository on GitHub
# 2. Click "Settings" tab
# 3. Scroll to "Features" section
# 4. Check "Discussions"
# 5. Set up categories as listed above
